nonAuthority: This triage report is review evidence only.
It is not SpecPM registry acceptance.
It does not publish registry metadata.
It does not treat AI output as canonical SpecPackage, BoundarySpec, relation, or registry truth.

productVerdict.summary: Proceed to P30-T5 only for selected candidate-layer review packages. Defer package-set and warning-bearing candidates until targeted regeneration or explicit maintainer approval resolves their findings.

triageFindings.reason: The warning did not change generated candidate ids, deterministic preflight, or author-ready status. Treat it as bounded model-output noise and exclude the unknown-package fragment from handoff evidence.
triageFindings.recommendedAction: Proceed with selected deterministic candidates while ignoring the noisy AI draft exclusion field.

triageFindings.reason: The AI draft proposal omitted expected package-set identity. Do not use that AI draft evidence for handoff until the proposal is regenerated or the schema is corrected.
triageFindings.recommendedAction: Regenerate AI draft evidence before package-set or affected package handoff.

triageFindings.reason: The AI enrichment proposal did not provide a refined summary, so the candidate needs another enrichment pass before selected handoff.
triageFindings.recommendedAction: Regenerate enrichment or ask the author to supply a package-specific summary.

triageFindings.reason: The manifest package id hint uses navigation-split-view.core while generated output normalized to navigation_split_view.core. Resolve the naming policy before handoff.
triageFindings.recommendedAction: Fix the manifest hint, update normalization policy, or record explicit maintainer approval for the generated id.

triagePolicy.blocked: Required local input is missing or a hard gate failed.
triagePolicy.candidate_layer_review_required: Valid starter package can proceed to author or maintainer review without becoming accepted registry truth.
triagePolicy.needs_regeneration: Producer output should be regenerated or corrected before selected handoff.
triagePolicy.not_for_intake: Useful calibration evidence that should not be handed to SpecPM.

triagedCandidates.reason: Deterministic preflight passed, author-ready status is present, enrichment completed, and the only AI draft warning is non-blocking model noise.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Ignore noisy excluded_package_unknown draft field during handoff review.

triagedCandidates.reason: Deterministic preflight passed, author-ready status is present, enrichment completed, and the only AI draft warning is non-blocking model noise.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Ignore noisy excluded_package_unknown draft field during handoff review.

triagedCandidates.reason: Package-set deterministic output is reviewable, but package-set AI draft evidence must be regenerated before selected handoff.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Regenerate package-set AI draft evidence with package-set identity.

triagedCandidates.reason: Member candidate is tied to package-set AI draft evidence that omitted package-set identity.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Regenerate package-set AI draft evidence with package-set identity.

triagedCandidates.reason: Member candidate is tied to package-set AI draft evidence that omitted package-set identity.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Regenerate package-set AI draft evidence with package-set identity.

triagedCandidates.reason: Member candidate is tied to package-set AI draft evidence that omitted package-set identity.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Regenerate package-set AI draft evidence with package-set identity.

triagedCandidates.reason: Deterministic candidate is valid, but selected handoff should wait for usable enrichment or author-supplied summary evidence.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Regenerate AI enrichment or provide an author-curated summary.

triagedCandidates.reason: The generated id differs from the manifest hint and AI draft evidence also lacks expected package-set identity.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Resolve package id normalization for navigation-split-view.core versus navigation_split_view.core.
Regenerate AI draft evidence after the identity policy is resolved.

triagedCandidates.reason: Deterministic preflight passed, author-ready status is present, AI draft completed, AI enrichment completed, and no candidate-layer finding was recorded.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Author or maintainer semantic review remains required.
